name: Lago Dourado Minerals Ltd.
description: Lago Dourado Minerals Ltd. is a Canadian-based mineral exploration company that was primarily engaged in the acquisition and exploration of mineral properties. Historically focused on advancing gold projects, such as the Juruena gold project in the state of Mato Grosso, Brazil, the company operated as a junior mining entity listed on the TSX Venture Exchange. Following various corporate developments and property transactions, the company has undergone significant changes, including a name change to G2 Goldfields Inc. in 2016, reflecting its evolving strategic focus within the natural resource sector.
